summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3, REQ-4, and REQ-6 have clear evidence of implementation. REQ-5 (admin Dashboard.tsx stats/recent students) is not visible in the diff — the file is not among the modified files. ManageStudentSessions.tsx imports session hooks from useQueries.ts rather than useSessions.ts, which technically bypasses the stated constraint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the admin Dashboard overview page (frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx) correctly fetches and displays the recent students list and summary stats (total students, active, pending, payments) from the backend using existing React Query hooks.
missing_requirements.reason: frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx is not listed among the modified files in the diff. There is no evidence that the admin Dashboard page was updated to fetch stats and recent students from the backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Existing backend session hooks (useSessions.ts) must be used for ManageStudentSessions.
missing_requirements.reason: ManageStudentSessions.tsx imports useGetSessionsForStudent, useAddSession, and useDeleteSession from useQueries.ts rather than from useSessions.ts as required by the build request constraint.

hallucinated_features.description: Auto-fill of relatedCourse field in ManageStudentMaterials when a student is selected
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies the materials form should include title, description, and file/URL link only. A relatedCourse field with auto-fill behavior was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Student search filter input within the student selection area on ManageStudentSessions and ManageStudentMaterials pages
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a dropdown to select students from the backend but does not mention an additional search box within the student selection on these pages.
